reviews.comment:
Una Mersa, CERO servicio, baños detonados y el YPF full abre 7:30 llegamos a las 2 de la mañana y no pudimos tomar nada hasta esa hora.

(Translated by Google)
A Mersa, ZERO service, bathrooms destroyed and the YPF full opens at 7:30, we arrived at 2 in the morning and we couldn't get anything until that time.

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para un descanso en la ruta árboles y sombra para estacionar. Muy buena atención en playa y baños limpíos el Shop no es muy completo en el desayuno faltaron medialunas

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to rest along the route, with trees and shade for parking. Very good service on the beach and clean restrooms. The shop isn't very well stocked; they were missing croissants at breakfast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtamMzWURnEAE

reviews.comment:
Nos encontramos que el almacén estaba en restauración y las máquinas que daban agua caliente no funcionaban ninguna de las dos na pena

(Translated by Google)
We found that the warehouse was under restoration and neither of the machines that provided hot water were working, sadly.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien ubicado, a distancia justa desde bsas para hacer noche,  tanto si vas o volves desde el sur. Muy buena atención de los chicos.  Muy cuidados los espacios,  prolijos.

(Translated by Google)
Perfectly located, just the right distance from Buenos Aires for an overnight stay, whether you're traveling to or from the south. Excellent service from the staff. The spaces are very well maintained and tidy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcFotT253RRAB
